failureSummary: The clarify-launch assertion in actions.test.ts used toMatchObject(expect.arrayContaining(...)) against heterogeneous content parts, so the matcher failed even though the route receipt, tool-call part, and reviewed launch part were correct.
index.test.ts timed out under the broader Vitest run because importing model-calls/index.ts also loaded the heavy stream-text and generate-image re-export graph for a generateText-only tracing test.
